articles.title: A French Ship Sails Through a Busy Waterway
articles.summary: A French-owned ship has sailed through the Strait of Hormuz, a very important waterway for ships. This happened more than a month after a war between the US, Israel, and Iran closed the strait. The ship is owned by a French company called CMA CGM, and it is the first big Western European ship to go through since the war started. Iran says ships that are not fighting can use the strait, but many ships have been attacked, so most ships have stopped going. This strait is used to carry about one-fifth of the world's oil and natural gas. When ships could not go through, oil prices went up, making fuel more expensive for people. Now, some ships are starting to go through again, but not as many as before.

articles.title: Rapper Gucci Mane Kidnapped in Dallas
articles.summary: Rapper Gucci Mane was kidnapped at gunpoint in Dallas earlier this year. He was held by other men, including a fellow rapper named Pooh Shiesty, who forced him to sign papers. The men also stole his jewelry and cash. Eight people have been arrested for this crime, and they could go to jail for life if found guilty. The FBI says the men used guns and hurt other people in the room. This happened in January, and one person is still missing. Gucci Mane is a famous rapper from Atlanta who has worked with stars like Drake.

articles.title: Raye's New Album Tops the Charts
articles.summary: Raye is a singer who just released a new album called This Music May Contain Hope. It became the number one album in the charts this week. This is her first time having the top album. Her song Where is My Husband is also very popular and has been streamed almost a billion times. Other artists like Olivia Dean and Kanye West are in the top three albums too. In the singles chart, Olivia Dean and Sam Fender have the number one song. Raye's album mixes jazz, blues, and soul music. She said she wanted to bring back a classic Motown feeling. Last year, she won six Brit awards, which is a record. The article talks about music charts and different artists.

articles.title: US Jobs Grow a Lot in March
articles.summary: In March, the United States added many new jobs, with 178,000 more people working, which was more than experts thought would happen. The unemployment rate went down to 4.3%. This happened even though there is a war in Iran that might make things uncertain. The health care industry helped create many jobs because strikes ended. The job market is strong, and this might make the US central bank, called the Federal Reserve, wait before changing interest rates. The war could affect oil prices, which might make things cost more, but it's too early to know for sure. Jobs grew in health care, construction, and manufacturing, but some areas like finance and tech lost jobs.

articles.title: U2 Releases New Music and Talks About Growing Up
articles.summary: U2 is a famous rock band from Ireland. They just released a new set of songs called Easter Lily. This is their second surprise release in 2024. The band has been quiet because their drummer was recovering from surgery. The singer Bono says the songs are about friendship, faith, and getting stronger. The music sounds fresh but still has their classic style from the 1980s. A music expert says U2 is not pretending to be young anymore, but they are writing about their age in a honest way. The band is also releasing a digital magazine with the songs. They are working on a new album too. This shows U2 is still creative and making music that fans can enjoy.

articles.title: Siblings on a Big Race Show
articles.summary: Katie and Harrison are siblings who joined a TV show called Race Across the World. In this show, teams travel across Europe and Asia without phones and with little money to win a prize. Katie was nervous at first, but Harrison convinced her to go. They had to do jobs to earn more money and faced challenges like getting lost. Katie says spending time with her brother was easy because they know each other well. She thinks being mean to each other actually makes their relationship stronger. The show is fun to watch and helps siblings bond.
